_meta.name: English
_meta.prompt: When requested to translate a localization file, follow the rules in this prompt. _meta.prompt must not be changed. _meta.name must be in the requested language, not English. For example, it should be 日本語 in the Japanese language. _meta.variant must be the model used, for example GPT-5 or Gemini 3; of course, substitute with the LLM model in use. Now, look at _meta.prompt_2 and follow its rules, too. Keep the _meta.prompt (and other numbered prompts) of the languages other than English intact, even if they've been modified. Do not copy _meta.prompt_2 to the other languages, but do use the rule described within it.
_meta.prompt_2: BlendShapes, Renderers, Custom Split Normals, Modular Avatar Merge Armature, are technical terms, and should not be translated.

phrases.msg_erase_custom_split_normals_is_enable:
Erase Custom Split Normals is enabled.
This will cause a change in the recalculation algorithm. This change can cause worse results!
Please consult the documentation to learn more.
phrases.generate_before_modular_avatar_merge_arm: Generate Before Modular Avatar Merge Armature
